summary: V7-E successfully fixed the HTTP/2 protocol error from V7-D (#706). The thread fetch and all collateral requests now complete cleanly via h2 protocol with valid framing. However, the SPA does NOT render the warning bubble — the synthetic thread doc structure does not match what the perplexity SPA expects to render answer content. Escalate to V7-F to fix the response shape.
prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

console_errors: Access to script 'pplx-next-static-public.../restricted-feature-loader-Cw3-0exd.js' blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header (cloudflare access redirect — unrelated to V7-E)
Failed to load resource: net::ERR_FAILED (same cloudflare access script — unrelated)
User declined or dismissed prompt. API exponential cool down triggered. (FedCM — unrelated, login-related)
[GSI_LOGGER] FedCM get() rejects with NetworkError: Error retrieving a token (FedCM/Google sign-in — unrelated)
network_observations.note: Zero ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR observed on any www.perplexity.ai request. The 4 console errors are cloudflare-access/FedCM auth-flow issues unrelated to APF V7-E injection.

dom_scan.warning_keyword_match_in_dom: MATCHED but only because user's own query (containing '주민등록') is rendered — NOT an APF warning
dom_scan.body_inner_text_full:
답변
Comet 다운로드
내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
dom_scan.interpretation: The SPA navigated to the thread URL, and the thread fetch returned HTTP 200 with a small (806-byte) synthetic body. But the SPA did NOT render any answer content nor an injected warning bubble. The user's query bubble is the only chat-like content visible. On reload, the URL even resolves to '이 스레드는 비공개입니다' (thread is private) login modal — the synthetic thread doc does not persist as a valid thread.

comparison_vs_706.706_result: FAIL — engine intercept fired but emitted malformed HTTP/2 frames, causing browser ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on /rest/thread/<UUID>; collateral requests on the same connection were also poisoned
comparison_vs_706.708_result: PARTIAL — V7-E successfully calls convert_to_http2_response on the synthetic thread doc and sets is_http2=0; the resulting frames are valid H2; browser sees no protocol error; collateral requests succeed cleanly
improvements: Connection no longer poisoned — collateral analytics, sse, widgets, consent-requirement all complete via h2
Synthetic thread doc reaches the browser intact (806 bytes)
remaining_problem: SPA renders empty answer panel — no warning bubble, no answer text
Synthetic thread doc body shape does not match perplexity SPA's expected /rest/thread/<UUID> response schema (with parent_info / schematized_response fields)
On reload, thread URL resolves to private/not-found modal — synthetic doc doesn't persist server-side either
comparison_vs_706.next_step: V7-F should investigate the expected JSON schema of /rest/thread/<UUID> with the long supported_block_use_cases query string, and shape the synthetic thread doc to include the minimum entries (likely an entries[] array with a warning block) so the SPA can render the warning bubble.

recommendation: Escalate V7-F: shape the synthetic thread doc body to match perplexity's expected schema. The HTTP/2 transport layer is now correct; the application-layer response shape is the new bottleneck.
